issue_title: Footer navigation overflows on small screens on classroomio.com
issue_body_preview:
### Issue Description

On the production site (https://classroomio.com/), the footer navigation is not fully responsive on small-width devices (e.g., 350–390px). The navigation section shifts left and part of it gets cut off on narrow screens.


### Steps to Reproduce

1. Open https://classroomio.co
test_description_zh: 在宽度为350px至390px的小屏幕视口下，访问 classroomio.com 首页，滚动到页面底部，观察 footer 导航区域的布局和显示情况。
expected_result_zh: Footer 导航在小屏幕设备上完整显示，不会向左偏移或被裁剪，所有导航链接均可见且布局自适应屏幕宽度，无水平溢出或内容截断现象。
